description: TechFlow Solutions is submitting a proposal for the 'Municipal Wi-Fi Expansion Project' (RFP #2026-WIFI-09) to the City of Oakdale. Format the technical volume using the draft text from '/home/ga/Documents/draft_proposal.json' and the formatting guide from '/home/ga/Documents/formatting_requirements.txt'. The final document must have 'Heading 1' paragraph style applied to the four section titles (Executive Summary, Technical Approach, Implementation Plan, Past Performance), 1.00 inch (2.54 cm) margins on all sides, a header containing 'RFP #2026-WIFI-09 - Technical Volume', and a footer with page numbers. Save the completed document as '/home/ga/Documents/TechFlow_Proposal_Volume_I.odt'.
